_comment2: Day 15 - Custom Sound Events for STEM Through Games

custom.footstep._comment: Plays when the player is walking. Triggered by command block.

custom.footstep_soft._comment: A quieter footstep variant for sneaking. Great extension exercise!

custom.jump._comment: Plays when the player leaves the ground.

custom.land._comment: Plays when the player lands back on the ground.

custom.collect._comment: Plays when the player picks up a collectible (e.g. gold nugget).

custom.hurt._comment: Extension challenge: plays when player takes damage.

custom.theme._comment: Background music. Set to loop=true so it repeats continuously.

custom.theme_tense._comment: Extension: alternate music for dangerous areas (near caves, mobs, etc.).
